subtasks.description: Query spend data for current month and prior 3 months. Calculate 3-month average spend, current month spend, variance, and percent deviation. Return results with enough detail to support anomaly classification.

Receive spend variance data from sql_spend_analysis. Reconcile current month against 3-month baseline. Classify each anomaly as normal_variance (within 1 standard deviation or <15% deviation), concerning (1-2 std dev or 15-30% deviation), or critical (>2 std dev or >30% deviation). Return classification with rationale.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen at mid tier to compute 3-month baseline, current month spend, variance metrics across multiple months and spending categories with aggregation and time-window logic. (2) cross_recon at mid tier to apply classification thresholds and reconcile variance data into risk categories—this is a reconciliation+classification task, not a policy decision, so it belongs in cross_recon rather than policy_action. No separate policy_action needed since the query asks for business classification, not governance approval. No multitool_plan needed as both subtasks use native query/analysis agents. Minimal subtask count justified: single SQL pull covers the entire analytics requirement, and classification is naturally part of reconciliation logic.

output.sql: WITH monthly_spend AS (SELECT publisher, product, DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date) AS month, SUM(amount_usd) AS spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months' GROUP BY publisher, product, DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)), current_month AS (SELECT publisher, product, spend AS current_spend FROM monthly_spend WHERE month = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)), prior_avg AS (SELECT publisher, product, AVG(spend) AS avg_3mo_spend FROM monthly_spend WHERE month < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND month >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months' GROUP BY publisher, product) SELECT c.publisher, c.product, c.current_spend, p.avg_3mo_spend, (c.current_spend - p.avg_3mo_spend) AS variance, CASE WHEN p.avg_3mo_spend = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((c.current_spend - p.avg_3mo_spend) / p.avg_3mo_spend) * 100 END AS pct_deviation FROM current_month c JOIN prior_avg p ON c.publisher = p.publisher AND c.product = p.product ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE((c.current_spend - p.avg_3mo_spend) / NULLIF(p.avg_3mo_spend, 0), 0)) DESC

reconciled.rationale: No MongoDB operational data provided. SQL analysis ready to classify spend anomalies once results are received.

normal_variance.criteria: Within 1 standard deviation OR <15% absolute deviation

output.note: Awaiting SQL query results from sql_spend_analysis to perform reconciliation and classification
